user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Fast continental or grab-and-go breakfast in the hotel dining area to eat before the 9:00 AM meeting. Options for takeaway if you need to head straight to the office.
highlights: Fast service to make the meeting on time

insertion_point.reasoning: Insert at position 0 so breakfast occurs before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting; scheduled 8:15-8:45AM to allow time to eat and walk to the meeting.
